⏺Bash(sleep 3 && cat                               /private/tmp/claude-504/-Users-ANISH-NEUNAHA-Desktop-Claws/509b      ee2c-0e2a-4cab-8e7d-e6d9b7ddd6e8/tasks/b1pcc1il1.output)         ⎿  Waiting…                                                                     ✶Orbiting… (2m 7s· ↓ 1.5ktokens ·thught for 5s)
